name: Glacien the Ice Sculptor
dialogue: Mist hides. Ice STAYS. What I shape down here, the thaw never undoes.
Show me your team can hold a line longer than the Veil holds the cold.
preBattleLine: Glacien hammers his fist down. The dojo floor sheets over with frost.
postDefeatDialogue: Glacien shatters his own ice with a flick. Steam rises.
"Tindra waits in the back. She doesn’t do mercy."
